content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Emotes". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1117/B
constraints: The string s consists of only ':' , '-' and '~' characters.
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of test cases. Then for each test case, there is a string s of length 3.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print 'YES' if the string is an emote, 'NO' otherwise.

solution.approach: Check all possible combinations of the given characters to form an emote.
